author: tersec
content:
Dora issue, https://dora.glamsterdam-devnet-5.ethpandaops.io/slot/112133 for example links to https://dora.glamsterdam-devnet-5.ethpandaops.io/validator/2714 as its validator, but it says

author: tersec
content: and that seems to be the case in general
